lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਊਚ ਆਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: agam agaadh aooch aapaar |
lines.english: O inaccessible, unfathomable, lofty and infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੂ ਹੋਵਨਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hai toohai too hovanahaar |
lines.english: You are, You are, and You shall ever be,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਭਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh seveh tin bhau dukh naeh |
lines.english: Those who serve You, are not touched by fear or suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad naanak gun gaeh |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਅਨੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan govind anoop |
lines.english: O Lord of the Universe, O Lord of incomparable beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਤੇਰਾ ਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so teraa roop |
lines.english: Whatever is seen, is Your form, O treasure of virtue,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jin japiaa tis kau balihaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak karam paraapat hoe |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Grace, we obtain Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਜਨ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: simar simar simar jan soe |
lines.english: Remembering, remembering, remembering the Lord in meditation, His humble servant becomes like Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਲੋਚਾ ਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak prabh lochaa poor |
lines.english: Says Nanak, God fulfills our hopes and aspirations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 5 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis kai sang tarai sansaar |
lines.english: Associating with them, the whole world is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਛਉ ਧੂਰਿ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee baachhau dhoor |4|2|
lines.english: I long for the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਸਗਲ ਕਉ ਦੇਇ ਦਾਨੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea sagal kau dee daan | rahaau |
lines.english: He gives His gifts to all beings. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ॥ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: miharavaan saahib miharavaan | saahib meraa miharavaan |
lines.english: Merciful, the Lord Master is Merciful. My Lord Master is Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪੈਦਾਇਸਿ ਤੂ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਦੇਇ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin paidaaeis too keea soee dee aadhaar |1|
lines.english: He who created you, will also give you nourishment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਾਹੇ ਡੋਲਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਰਾਖੈਗਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: too kaahe ddoleh praaneea tudh raakhaigaa sirajanahaar |
lines.english: Why do you waver, O mortal being? The Creator Lord Himself shall protect you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਮਾਲਕੁ ਦਿਲਾ ਕਾ ਸਚਾ ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt maalak dilaa kaa sachaa paravadagaar |2|
lines.english: In each and every heart and mind, the Lord is the True Cherisher. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਦਾ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jin upaaee medanee soee karadaa saar |
lines.english: The One who created the world, takes care of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਵਡਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: kudarat keem na jaaneeai vaddaa veparavaahu |
lines.english: His creative potency and His value cannot be known; He is the Great and carefree Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਬੰਦੇ ਤੂ ਬੰਦਗੀ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਹੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kar bande too bandagee jichar ghatt meh saahu |3|
lines.english: O human being, meditate on the Lord, as long as there is breath in your body. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਅਕਥੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: too samarath akath agochar jeeo pindd teree raas |
lines.english: O God, You are all-powerful, inexpressible and imperceptible; my soul and body are Your capital.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਮ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: reham teree sukh paaeaa sadaa naanak kee aradaas |4|3|
lines.english: By Your Mercy, may I find peace; this is Nanak's lasting prayer. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਏਕ ਤੂਹੀ ਸਭ ਖਲਕ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਪਾਕੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deen duneea ek toohee sabh khalak hee te paak | rahaau |
lines.english: You alone are my spiritual and temporal Lord; and yet, You are detached from all Your creation. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 5 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੇ ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ਮੁਸਤਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: karate kudaratee musataak |
lines.english: O Creator, through Your creative potency, I am in love with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਚਲਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਅੰਧਿਆਰੇ ਮਹਿ ਦੀਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaun jaanai chalat tere andhiaare meh deep |1|
lines.english: Who can know Your play? You are the Light in the darkness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਦਾ ਆਚਰਜ ਤੇਰੇ ਰੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: khin maeh thaap uthaapadaa aacharaj tere roop |
lines.english: In an instant, You establish and disestablish. Wondrous is Your form!

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਜਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਅਰਾਧੇ ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਦੋਜਕਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dinas rain ji tudh araadhe so kiau dojak jaae |2|
lines.english: One who worships You day and night - why should he have to go to hell? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਦਿ ਖਸਮ ਖਲਕ ਜਹਾਨ ਅਲਹ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ਖੁਦਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khud khasam khalak jahaan alah miharavaan khudaae |
lines.english: You are the Master of Your creation, the Lord of all the world, O Merciful Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਰਾਈਲੁ ਯਾਰੁ ਬੰਦੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ajaraaeel yaar bande jis teraa aadhaar |
lines.english: Azraa-eel, the Messenger of Death, is the friend of the human being who has Your support, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨਹ ਉਸ ਕੇ ਸਗਲ ਆਫੂ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਨ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਦੀਦਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gunah us ke sagal aafoo tere jan dekheh deedaar |3|
lines.english: His sins are all forgiven; Your humble servant gazes upon Your Vision. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਚੀਜ ਫਿਲਹਾਲ ਸਗਲੇ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: duneea cheej filahaal sagale sach sukh teraa naau |
lines.english: All worldly considerations are for the present only. True peace comes only from Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੂਝਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਏਕਸੁ ਗਾਉ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur mil naanak boojhiaa sadaa ekas gaau |4|4|
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, Nanak understands; He sings only Your Praises forever, O Lord. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਰਾਂ ਦਾਨਾਂ ਦਿਲ ਸੋਚ ॥
lines.translit: meeraan daanaan dil soch |
lines.english: Think of the Lord in your mind, O wise one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਬਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਹ ਬੰਦੀ ਮੋਚ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: muhabate man tan basai sach saah bandee moch |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Enshrine love for the True Lord in your mind and body; He is the Liberator from bondage. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Tilang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਕ ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰ ਤੂ ਖੁਦਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਵਡਾ ਅਤੋਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paak paravadagaar too khud khasam vaddaa atol |1|
lines.english: You are the Pure Cherisher; You Yourself are the great and immeasurable Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਦਨੇ ਦੀਦਾਰ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਇਸ ਕਾ ਮੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: deedane deedaar saahib kachh nahee is kaa mol |
lines.english: The value of seeing the Vision of the Lord Master cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ੍ਤਗੀਰੀ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਿਲਾਵਰ ਤੂਹੀ ਤੂਹੀ ਏਕ ॥
lines.translit: dastageeree dehi dilaavar toohee toohee ek |
lines.english: Give me Your help, O brave and generous Lord; You are the One, You are the Only Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾਰ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਰਣ ਖਾਲਕ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: karataar kudarat karan khaalak naanak teree ttek |2|5|
lines.english: O Creator Lord, by Your creative potency, You created the world; Nanak holds tight to Your support. ||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: tilang mahalaa 1 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Tilang, First Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin keea tin dekhiaa kiaa kaheeai re bhaaee |
lines.english: The One who created the world watches over it; what more can we say, O Siblings of Destiny?

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
